```lean
theorem candidate_T2_disable
    (data : CharacterOrthogonalityData (G := G) (Γ := Γ)) (g : G) :
    ∑ χ : Γ, data.eval χ g = if g = 1 then (Fintype.card G : ℂ) else 0 := by
  simpa using data.sum_eval g
```
